headline: Truist Securities Initiates Coverage On Wynn Resorts with Buy Rating, Announces Price Target of $125
summary: Truist Securities  analyst Barry Jonas   initiates coverage on Wynn Resorts (NASDAQ:WYNN) with a Buy rating and announces Price Target of $125.
